attacks.scenario: fs:tree 的 dir 未約束在 workspace 內→路徑穿越列舉 ~/.ssh/~/.aws（相對逃逸/絕對/UNC）
attacks.failSafeTest: resolve+realpath 雙重 containment、拒 UNC/\?\；攻擊矩陣全回 {entries:[]}、readdir 不落界外

attacks.scenario: workspace 內 junction/symlink 指向外部→經 watcher/tree 外洩或監看區外
attacks.failSafeTest: realpath containment、followSymlinks:false、symlink 標 dir:false；真 junction 測試

attacks.scenario: watcher 未排除 node_modules/.git→重目錄高 CPU（違 REQ-MON-006）
attacks.failSafeTest: ignored 路徑分段比對；真 chokidar 測 node_modules 不觸發、src 觸發

attacks.scenario: 並發 fs:tree 同 wsId→建多個 watcher 洩漏；teardown 不清→殭屍
attacks.failSafeTest: ensureWatch 冪等（同步 check-set）、teardown size===0 收不到事件

attacks.scenario: 大量檔變動 flood→IPC 風暴卡 UI
attacks.failSafeTest: flood breaker 切 coarse '' 訊號、awaitWriteFinish 合併；500 檔→<50 推送
